title: PVC Scythe Rei figure Is there a matching Asuka
display_title: PVC Scythe Rei figure Is there a matching Asuka
wikitext:
[]: PVC Scythe Rei figure - Is there a matching Asuka?             Quote Post by GMAJ0R » Mon Nov 03, 2014 8:05 am http://www.zangeki.com/pic/figure/prize/evangelion_3_rei_scythe/rei_1.jpg I just picked up this Rei figure at a con over the weekend. I've done some searching on the internet, but haven't been able to find anything pertaining to a matching Asuka. Does anybody know if one exists? It'd be nice to have the pair on my shelf :P

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Nov 03, 2014 5:12 pm Yep, there's an upcoming Asuka figure with a double naginata like the one EVA-02 used in her fight against Shinji: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by MKDestroyer » Mon Nov 03, 2014 10:27 pm Dat ASSuka!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Nov 04, 2014 4:11 am MKDestroyer wrote: Dat ASSuka!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Nov 04, 2014 8:56 am The scale on those two don't match. Rei figure is listed as 210mm, which makes her roughly 1/7.5 Asuka is listed as 1/6 scale. Given the listed 380mm size to the top of the weapon and doing some pixel math with the photos, top of Asuka's head come out to ~26cm, which is exactly where she should be at 1/6 scale of 157cm height. Rei being a whole head shorter than Asuka is gonna look very awkward on the shelf.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Nov 04, 2014 10:13 am ^ I meant matching in the theme, which is the pilots in their 3.0 plugsuit holding a human sized version of the weapon of choice their Eva used in the movie.
